title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for outdoor family days
subtitle: Warm milk at the park, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Hard to warm a bottle at the park? Outdoor feeds should not mean cold milk or long waits. Portable heating that keeps up with your park day. Small enough for the diaper bag, ready at the bench. Save this for your next park day.

storyboard.visual: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：新手妈妈；场景：公园遛娃（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热；进液来源仅限：储奶袋（母乳储存袋）或家里日常使用的婴儿奶瓶倒奶；禁止出现：市售牛奶塑料瓶、鲜奶纸盒/利乐包、酸奶杯、任意商超乳制品包装；结构严格对照产品参考图：顶部为翻盖式铰链盖（侧面浅紫矩形按键弹开），非螺旋旋盖；倒出口为盖面碗形凹槽内的小圆孔出液嘴，倾斜杯身时暖奶从此圆孔流出；进液经翻开顶盖倒入杯内腔体；盖下深紫装饰环 nurture wise 标识；下段竖向数显屏（华氏度 °F 温度，典型约 98°F，禁止摄氏度）；数显旁椭圆形 recessed 电源键；底部 recessed 充电口（硅胶盖内，非杯身侧面 USB 口）；禁止画成：圆顶旋盖、宽口直倒、杯身侧面充电口、奶瓶放入杯内；数显温度单位为华氏度（°F），禁止显示摄氏度（°C）；出口版典型读数约 98°F（接近体温的舒适温奶，非沸水）；屏上须带 °F 标识，不得把 98 画成 98°C 或仅写 98 无单位；母乳/配方奶为温热状态（body-warm），倒奶时液体平稳流出；禁止：烧开冒热气、大量白色蒸汽、沸腾起泡、火苗加热、滚烫发红液体；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook opening, park outing with baby, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, medium shot holding portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo beside separate baby bottle on bedside table, warm soft light, subtle push-in, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. Mood: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?

Outdoor feeds should not mean cold milk or long waits.

Product demo, park outing with baby, same approved caregiver as reference: 女性角色-照护者-01; wardrobe cream chunky ribbed knit sweater, light-wash straight-leg jeans, white sneakers; match likeness and realistic hand physics, side angle — flip-top lid open, pour milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, flip-top hinged lid with integrated circular pour spout hole in bowl-shaped lid recess, light-purple lid release button, nurture wise band, vertical digital Fahrenheit °F display showing ~98°F, pour-spout reference photo, tilt to pour warm milk OUT from lid spout into baby feeding bottle, realistic pour physics, vertical display visible, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style, no medical claim, same person identity across all shots, motivated key light, soft shadows, natural reflections, realistic exposure, match white-background hero product appearance exactly, no redesign; physics-safe pour and hand motion; scenario-consistent props. Portable thermos cup warms milk inside; pour body-warm milk OUT through lid spout into baby bottle; Fahrenheit °F display ~98°F only, no °C; no steam or boiling; never put bottle inside cup; match white-background hero and pour-spout reference exactly. STRUCTURE (match pour-spout product reference exactly): flip-top hinged lid on top with light-purple side release button, NOT a screw cap; integrated POUR OUTLET is a small circular spout hole inside a bowl-shaped recess on the lid — when cup is tilted, warm milk streams OUT thro. Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.

shot_asset_map.dialogue_or_subtitle: Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.
shot_asset_map.visual_description: 公园遛娃：储奶袋/家用奶瓶经翻盖倒入杯内加热，倾斜经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒入干净奶瓶（便携设计；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶的圆柱暖奶容器，非奶瓶暖奶器）；用法：从储奶袋或家用奶瓶经翻开顶盖倒入杯内加热保温，再倾斜杯身经盖面圆孔出液嘴倒出到干净奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、从宽口直倒（必须经过圆孔出液嘴）、奶瓶浸在杯中加热）

STRUCTURE (match pour-spout product reference exactly): flip-top hinged lid on top with light-purple side release button, NOT a screw cap; integrated POUR OUTLET is a small circular spout hole inside a bowl-shaped recess on the lid — when cup is tilted, warm milk streams OUT thro. production_fidelity.temperature_display_rule: Fahrenheit °F only on display (~98°F typical); never Celsius °C.
production_fidelity.milk_physics_rule: Body-warm breast milk/formula pour only; no boiling, steam plume, or bubbling hot liquid.
